_source.packageData:
Package ID: PKG013836 is named 'Fusion Europe - Winter' and spans 11 days. The itinerary includes:
Day 1 - Paris, Meals: Dinner, Description: Welcome to Paris! On arrival, our Tour Manager / Local Representative will meet and welcome you outside the airport. Later, we proceed to the hotel and check–in. Note: Joining direct passenger / NRI can check-in on your own at the hotel. The standard check-in time is 1500 hrs. We may have to proceed directly for dinner or packed dinner will be provided in case of late arrivals of flight or long queue at the immigration., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 2 - Paris, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Guided city tour of Paris – Visit Fragonard - Guided tour of Versailles Palace– River Seine Cruise Today, we proceed on a guided tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House and Les Invalides. Next, we visit the Famous French perfume museum – Fragonard. Later, we proceed for a Guided Tour of Versailles Palace with private apartments, Opera Hall, the Chapel & Hall of Mirrors. In the evening, we take a scenic cruise on river Seine., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 3 - Paris, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Disneyland® Paris (01 Day 01 Park) - Eiffel Tower (2nd Level) – Illumination Tour Today, we proceed to Disneyland® Paris (Upto 5 hrs), where you can visit Disneyland® Park OR Disneyland® Studios. Get charmed by Sleeping Beauty Castle, enjoy exciting rollercoaster rides, meet Alice in Wonderland, Pinocchio and others in Fantasyland as well as travelling to the four corners of the globe in Adventureland. Next we visit the Eiffel tower 2nd level. After dinner, we enjoy ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the city’s famous monuments / sights light up. Note: Due to stringent security checks at the Eiffel Tower, it may take up to 4 – 5 hours in the queue., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 4 - Zurich, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Onto Scenic SwitzerlandToday, we enjoy a scenic drive to Switzerland. On arrival, check-in to the hotel., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 5 - Zurich, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Day at leisure OR Chance to visit Jungfraujoch with lunch and Interlaken (Optional) Today, the day is at leisure OR you can join us for a visit to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe. We board the cable car followed by a cog-wheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station. Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps. Later, we visit Interlaken. Note: Guests who do not opt for this Optional excursion will get packed dinner delivered at the hotel when the group arrives., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 6 - Serpiano, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Mt. Titlis – Orientation tour of Lucerne Today, we drive to Lucerne for an orientation tour: See the Lion Monument and Kapellbrucke. Next, we enjoy some free time to explore the town and shop for Swiss watches, knives, chocolates and souvenirs. Later, we proceed to Mt. Titlis where you will take cable car rides including the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters. Do visit the “Cliff Walk” - a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis.” Note: On the days, Mt Titlis is closed due to maintenance or weather conditions, we shall take the group to alternate mountain excursion., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 7 - Arezzo, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Photo stop at the Leaning Tower of Pisa Today, we proceed to Pisa. On arrival, we visit the Square of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 8 - Arezzo, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Day trip to Rome: Guided tour of Rome and Vatican City Today we go on a day trip to Rome and Vatican City. On arrival, we proceed for a guided city tour of Vatican City: the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed), where we visit the famous St. Peter’s Basilica and St. Peter’s Square. Next, we continue for a guided city tour of Rome: See Circus Maximus and photo-stop at Colosseum & Arc of Constantine., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 9 - Vicenza, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Orientation tour of VeniceToday, we proceed to the pier and take a private boat to Venice. On arrival, we visit St. Mark’s square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile and Bridge of Sighs. Later, spend time to explore the city on your own., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 10 - Munich, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Orientation tour of Innsbruck – Swarovski Crystal Worlds – Onto Munich Today, we drive to Innsbruck. On arrival, we enjoy an orientation tour: See the Golden Roof and Maria Theresien Strasse. Next, we visit the Swarovski Crystal World; an experience attraction created by André Heller for the crystal glass manufacturer Swarovski, consisting of a park, art museum, retail area, and restaurant. Later drive to Munich., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
Day 11 - Munich, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Fly back home with pleasant memories! Today, we proceed to Munich airport for your flight back home. Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime. Note: Due to flight connectivity, few groups may depart out of Frankfurt instead of Munich. Kindly check with your sales staff for your exact flight details. In major European cities, there are parking restrictions for coaches and it is not possible to stop at all the places during the city tour. Your Tour Manager will try his/her best to stop coach wherever possible for a photo stop., GeoLocation: (Lat: 0.0, Lon: 0.0).
The price is 305120.0. Hotels envisaged include: Overnight stay at the Hotels, 
03 nights at Clarion CDG / Moxy CDG / Ibis Styles CDG or similar in Paris (CDG Area), France.
02 nights at Novotel Zurich Messe / Prizeotel Affoltern am Albis / La Maison Suisse Döttingen or similar in Zurich/ Dottingen, Switzerland.
01 night at Coronado / Serpiano or similar in Mendriso / Serpiano, Switzerland.
02 nights at Hotel Park / President or similar in Arezzo, Italy.
01 night at Hotel AC by Marriott / Alfa Fiera / SHG Catullo or similar in Vicenza / Verona, Italy.
01 night at Holiday Inn express / Flightgate Munich Airport / Amedia Dachau or similar in Munich, Germany.
. Meals include: Breakfast Included, 
Daily continental breakfast (Breakfast includes bread, butter, jam, cereals, fruit juice, milk and coffee). 
05 Indian Jain / vegetarian / non vegetarian lunches.
10 Indian Jain / vegetarian /non-vegetarian dinners.

Note: Packed lunches, if applicable, will be Jain / vegetarian. In certain places, there is a possibility of providing cash out to the passengers instead of packed lunches.. Inclusions: Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary. All local taxes and services as of 1st June, 2025. Cost of Visa and Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour. Sightseeing and accommodation as per the above-mentioned itinerary. All transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach. Services of a professional, friendly and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative. (Subject to minimum 15 customers). Visa Requirements: Multiple entry Schengen visa. This cost includes documentation, processing and consulate fees. FREE Borderless Forex card with many benefits. Get doorstep delivery of best-in-the-industry Forex card. It loads up to 12 currencies in a single card. Its safe, secure & most convenient to use on an international holiday. Comes with Tap & Pay feature and a host of benefits like Free International E-sim card, Lounge Access at International airports and much more. T & C apply.. Exclusions: If you wish to travel in advance i.e., before the published departure date as mentioned in the brochure or like to come back on a later date after the tour ends, there will be an additional charge that will be applicable (subject to availability of seats for the given dates & ticket validity) which will be advised to you by our sales staff / travel agent. Kindly note, the deviation will be actioned only 30 Days prior to departure date. Tipping is expected from anyone providing your service e.g., Coach Driver, Local Guides, Hotel & Restaurant staff etc. It is mandatory to tip a nominal amount of EUR 3 per person/per day. For the entire duration of this tour, which is 11 Days, the total Tips amount is EUR 33 per person to be paid to the Tour Manager on Day 01 of the tour. Cost of Basic Travel Quota equivalent to USD 250,000. Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as on 1st June, 2025) Government Taxes as applicable are extra. The tour cost does not include POE charges and passport charges. No porterage included. Any expenses of a personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, wines, mineral water, food and drink not in the regular menu provided by us, minibar, telephone calls, etc. Meals other than that are mentioned in your itinerary. Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in your itinerary. Private airport transfers, Cost of Suggested / Optional Excursions.. Product Terms and Conditions: N/A. Highlights of the package: .
_source.packageSummary: The 'Fusion Europe - Winter' package is an 11-day tour covering a diverse range of cities including Arezzo, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Vicenza, with multiple visits to some of these destinations. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Uffizi Gallery in Arezzo, the Swiss Alps in Zurich, the Eiffel Tower in Paris, and the Nymphenburg Palace in Munich. Participants will enjoy guided city tours, scenic train rides, and visits to local markets and artisan workshops, providing a unique blend of culture, history, and natural beauty.

packageItinerary.summary: The 'Fusion Europe - Winter' package is an 11-day tour covering a diverse range of cities including Arezzo, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Vicenza, with multiple visits to some of these destinations. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Uffizi Gallery in Arezzo, the Swiss Alps in Zurich, the Eiffel Tower in Paris, and the Nymphenburg Palace in Munich. Participants will enjoy guided city tours, scenic train rides, and visits to local markets and artisan workshops, providing a unique blend of culture, history, and natural beauty.

Welcome to Paris!
On arrival, our Tour Manager / Local Representative will meet and welcome you outside the airport. Later, we proceed to the hotel and check–in.
Note: Joining direct passenger / NRI can check-in on your own at the hotel. The standard check-in time is 1500 hrs. We may have to proceed directly for dinner or packed dinner will be provided in case of late arrivals of flight or long queue at the immigration.

Disneyland® Paris (01 Day 01 Park) - Eiffel Tower (2nd Level) – Illumination Tour
Today, we proceed to Disneyland® Paris (Upto 5 hrs), where you can visit Disneyland® Park OR Disneyland® Studios. After dinner, we enjoy ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the city’s famous monuments / sights light up.

 Due to stringent security checks at the Eiffel Tower, it may take up to 4 – 5 hours in the queue.

Today, the day is at leisure OR you can join us for a visit to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe. We board the cable car followed by a cog-wheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station. Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps. Later, we visit Interlaken.  
 
Note: Guests who do not opt for this Optional excursion will get packed dinner delivered at the hotel when the group arrives.

Today, we drive to Lucerne for an orientation tour: See the Lion Monument and Kapellbrucke. Do visit the “Cliff Walk” - a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis.”
 
Note:

Orientation tour of Innsbruck – Swarovski Crystal Worlds – Onto Munich
Today, we drive to Innsbruck. On arrival, we enjoy an orientation tour: See the Golden Roof and Maria Theresien Strasse. Next, we visit the Swarovski Crystal World; an experience attraction created by André Heller for the crystal glass manufacturer Swarovski, consisting of a park, art museum, retail area, and restaurant. Later drive to Munich.
itinerary.overnightStay: Hotel Holiday Inn express / Flightgate Munich Airport / Amedia Dachau or similar in Munich, Germany

itinerary.description:
Fly back home with pleasant memories!
Today, we proceed to Munich airport for your flight back home. Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime. 
 
Note:

Due to flight connectivity, few groups may depart out of Frankfurt instead of Munich. Kindly check with your sales staff for your exact flight details. 
In major European cities, there are parking restrictions for coaches and it is not possible to stop at all the places during the city tour. Your Tour Manager will try his/her best to stop coach wherever possible for a photo stop.

_source.tourManagerDescription: Rest assured, Thomas Cook's experienced & knowledgeable tour manager will be with the group at every step of the journey. Be it transportation, accommodation & everything in between, ensuring a seamless & stress-free travel experience from start to finish. Whether it's a question or a challenge, our tour manager is always readily available to offer support, assistance & ensure that your trip becomes a most cherished memory. (Presence of the Tour Manager is subject to a minimum of 15 - 20 customers, depending on package/destination booked)
_source.flightDescription: • Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary
_source.inclusions:
Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.  
All local taxes and services as of 1st June, 2025.
Cost of Visa and Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.  
Sightseeing and accommodation as per the above-mentioned itinerary.
All transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
Services of a professional, friendly and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative. (Subject to minimum 15 customers).

Visa Requirements:

Multiple entry Schengen visa. 
This cost includes documentation, processing and consulate fees.


FREE Borderless Forex card with many benefits.

Get doorstep delivery of best-in-the-industry Forex card. It loads up to 12 currencies in a single card. Its safe, secure & most convenient to use on an international holiday. Comes with Tap & Pay feature and a host of benefits like Free International E-sim card, Lounge Access at International airports and much more. T & C apply.
_source.exclusions:
If you wish to travel in advance i.e., before the published departure date as mentioned in the brochure or like to come back on a later date after the tour ends, there will be an additional charge that will be applicable (subject to availability of seats for the given dates & ticket validity) which will be advised to you by our sales staff / travel agent. Kindly note, the deviation will be actioned only 30 Days prior to departure date.  
Tipping is expected from anyone providing your service e.g., Coach Driver, Local Guides, Hotel & Restaurant staff etc. It is mandatory to tip a nominal amount of EUR 3 per person/per day. For the entire duration of this tour, which is 11 Days, the total Tips amount is EUR 33 per person to be paid to the Tour Manager on Day 01 of the tour.
Cost of Basic Travel Quota equivalent to USD 250,000.
Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as on 1st June, 2025)
Government Taxes as applicable are extra.
The tour cost does not include POE charges and passport charges.
No porterage included.
Any expenses of a personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, wines, mineral water, food and drink not in the regular menu provided by us, minibar, telephone calls, etc.
Meals other than that are mentioned in your itinerary.
Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in your itinerary.
Private airport transfers, Cost of Suggested / Optional Excursions.
